ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "stn_code" TEXT /* Code used to identify the station */,
  "stn_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "platform_count" INTEGER /* Number of platforms available at the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station's location */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the station */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trains" (
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each train */,
  "train_number" TEXT /* Train identification number */,
  "train_name" TEXT /* Name of the train */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the train (e.g., express, freight) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the train */,
  "max_speed" INTEGER /* Maximum speed of the train */,
  "average_speed" INTEGER /* Average speed of the train */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the train (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the train for the schedule */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station for arrivals and departures */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Route identifier for the train */,
  "arrives" TEXT /* Arrival time at the station */,
  "departs" TEXT /* Departure time from the station */,
  "stop_time" TEXT /* Duration of stop at the station */,
  "day_of_week" INTEGER /* Day of the week (1-7) */,
  "avg_delay" TEXT /* Average delay for the schedule */,
  "schedule_status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., on-time, delayed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance in kilometers covered by the route */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., main line, branch line) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay record */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the schedule affected by the delay */,
  "delay_time" TEXT /* Total delay time experienced */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay */,
  "delay_type" TEXT /* Type of delay (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "delay_status" TEXT /* Status of the delay (e.g., resolved, unresolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delays_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, station manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for system login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the schedule affected by the alert */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., delay, cancellation) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station the platform belongs to */,
  "platform_number" INTEGER /* Platform number */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the platform (e.g., active, under maintenance) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the platform in meters */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the platform in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_platforms_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the train they are assigned to */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., conductor, engineer) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the staff member */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_staff_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fares" (
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare record */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route associated with the fare */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Type of class (e.g., economy, first class) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the fare */,
  "fare_type" TEXT /* Type of fare (e.g., one-way, return) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fare */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fares_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the train for which the ticket is purchased */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who purchased the ticket */,
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fare associated with the ticket */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was purchased */,
  "journey_date" TEXT /* Date of journey */,
  "boarding_station" TEXT /* Boarding station */,
  "destination_station" TEXT /* Destination station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_fare_id FOREIGN KEY ("fare_id") REFERENCES fares ("fare_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ticket purchased by the passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ticket associated with the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the passenger */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the passenger (1-5) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint record */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ticket associated with the complaint */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the complaint */,
  "complaint_date" TEXT /* Date when the complaint was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the complaint (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suggestions" (
  "suggestion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suggestion record */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ticket associated with the suggestion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the suggestion */,
  "suggestion_date" TEXT /* Date when the suggestion was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suggestion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suggestions_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)
